description: High-level wiring plan for all Horror.Place constellation repositories, describing roles, allowed objectKinds, and supported implementation languages.

repos.primaryRole: Canonical authority for JSON Schemas, routing spine, repo manifests, and AI authoring contracts.

objectKinds.name: moodContract
objectKinds.role: Defines invariant and entertainment metric targets for regions/sequences; schemas and examples only.

objectKinds.name: eventContract
objectKinds.role: Defines horror events structure and invariant/metric effects; schemas only.

objectKinds.name: regionContractCard
objectKinds.role: Canonical region card structure (CIC, MDI, AOS, RRM, FCF, SPR, RWF, DET, HVF, LSG, SHCI + metrics).

objectKinds.name: seedContractCard
objectKinds.role: Procedural seed structure connecting regions, personas, events, invariants.

objectKinds.name: bci-geometry-tileset
objectKinds.role: BCI-aware geometry tileset schema binding invariants, metrics, and Dead-Ledger caps to geometry profiles.

repos.primaryRole: Player-facing public layer: Tier-1 contracts, mood libraries, public region cards, and high-level orchestration specs.

objectKinds.name: moodContract
objectKinds.role: Public Tier-1 mood contracts (no raw horror), used as examples and starter packs.

objectKinds.name: regionContractCard
objectKinds.role: Public example region cards with lightly redacted history, for tutorials and public tooling.

objectKinds.name: bci-geometry-tileset
objectKinds.role: Tier-1 BCI-aware tileset contracts safe for public demonstration and dev tooling.

repos.primaryRole: CHATDIRECTOR and plan compiler; routes AiAuthoringRequests into the correct repos using the routing spine.

objectKinds.name: aiAuthoringPlan
objectKinds.role: High-level authoring plans describing sequences of artifact generations across repos.

objectKinds.name: aiAuthoringRequest
objectKinds.role: Per-request envelope carrying objectKind, tier, targetRepo, schemaRef, invariants, metrics.

repos.primaryRole: Vault of high-intensity procedural seeds and event contracts, bound to sensitive history data.

objectKinds.name: seedContractCard
objectKinds.role: Concrete Atrocity seeds intertwining regions, personas, and event chains (vault-only).

objectKinds.name: eventContract
objectKinds.role: High-impact horror events tied to specific regions and seed arcs.

repos.primaryRole: Deep history and region cards with thick AOS/MDI; used as the archive layer for high-CIC regions.

objectKinds.name: regionContractCard
objectKinds.role: Vault region cards backed by geo-historical data and archival gaps, used for PCG and spectral queries.

repos.primaryRole: Spectral entity templates and haunt pattern contracts; builds on region cards and seeds.

objectKinds.name: moodContract
objectKinds.role: Vault-only spectral moods and ambience tailored to specific haunt types.

objectKinds.name: eventContract
objectKinds.role: Spectral manifestation events driven by invariant bands and SHCI.

runtimeHints: Lua snippets embedded in contracts as IDs, not code

repos.primaryRole: Runtime engine adapters: Lua surface, Godot/unreal integration, invariant sampling, and geometry controllers.

objectKinds.name: mapFunctionAdapter
objectKinds.role: Adapter modules that realize contract families into runtime behavior (e.g., bci-geometry-tileset -> map functions).

repos.primaryRole: Entitlement and safety governance; holds profiles and proof envelopes for tilesets, seeds, and BCI.

objectKinds.name: deadLedgerProfile
objectKinds.role: Profiles describing DET caps, OVERWHELMED dwell limits, and band constraints for asset families.

repos.primaryRole: Internal orchestrator and Reaper-entity experiments (e.g., ReaperWanderingEntity) consuming the spine index.

objectKinds.name: reaperContractsRequest
objectKinds.role: Internal request envelopes describing what the Reaper wants to generate (objectKind, tier, invariant bands).
